California Auto Injury Settlement Calculator

Get a realistic estimate of your potential settlement

Based on actual insurance industry data and practices. This tool provides realistic ranges, not inflated promises. Remember: most soft tissue injuries settle between $5,000-$25,000.

Disclaimer: This calculator provides estimates only. Actual settlements vary based on numerous factors. Consult with a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your case.

Step 1 of 5: Demographics

Personal Information

Basic information helps estimate lost wages and life impact.

Fields marked with * are required

Why Use Our California Settlement Calculator?

Based on Real Data

Our calculator uses actual California settlement patterns and insurance industry practices, not inflated marketing promises.

California-Specific

Designed specifically for California law, including comparative negligence rules, policy minimums, and local settlement patterns.

Comprehensive Factors

Considers medical costs, lost wages, pain & suffering, age, injury severity, and whether you have legal representation.

Free & Private

Completely free to use with calculations performed in your browser. We don't store your personal information.

Need more information? Visit our About page to learn how our calculator works, or contact us with questions.

About This Calculator

Created by an experienced litigation adjuster to provide realistic settlement estimates based on actual insurance industry practices in California.

Important Notes

  • • This is an estimate tool only
  • • Actual settlements vary greatly
  • • Consult an attorney for legal advice
  • • California law specific

Settlement Reality

Most soft tissue injuries settle for $5,000-$25,000. Serious injuries with surgery or permanent impairment can reach six figures, but million-dollar settlements are extremely rare.
